title: OpenMAPS/CL
description: Open Medical Appointment Protocol Standard — Chilean Profile. A common JSON format for exchanging medical appointment availability data in Chile. Simplified FHIR R4 profile (Schedule/Slot/Appointment) with native Chilean fields: RUT, Fonasa A-D, GES/AUGE, SIS-MINSAL specialty codes.
author: Bernardo Cajales Millón

rut.description: Chilean national ID (RUT) in standard format XX.XXX.XXX-X

fonasa_accreditation_level.description: Nivel de acreditación Libre Elección del prestador en Fonasa (1, 2 o 3). Fuente: Superintendencia de Salud — Registro Nacional de Prestadores (rnpi.superdesalud.gob.cl).

insurance_type.description: Chilean insurance or coverage type. FONASA-A through D are the four Fonasa tiers. FONASA-LE = Libre Elección (any tier). ISAPRE = any private insurer. PARTICULAR = uninsured / self-pay.

provider_type.description: Type of healthcare provider. clinic=Clínica, hospital=Hospital, medical_center=Centro médico/policlínico, independent_professional=Médico con consulta propia, dental=Centro dental, laboratory=Laboratorio clínico, imaging_center=Centro de imágenes, rehabilitation=Kinesiología/fonoaudiología.

specialty.description: Medical specialty using SIS-MINSAL codes (MINSAL Sistema de Información de Salud).

sis_code.description: Official SIS-MINSAL specialty code (two digits, zero-padded).

sis_name.description: Official SIS-MINSAL specialty name in uppercase Spanish.

ges.description: GES (Garantías Explícitas en Salud) / AUGE information. GES guarantees access, timeliness, quality and financial protection for 87 specific health conditions in Chile.

is_ges.description: Whether this appointment falls under a GES guarantee.

ges_problem_code.description: GES problem number (1–87). Required when is_ges is true.

ges_problem_name.description: Name of the GES health problem.

waiting_days_guarantee.description: Maximum waiting days guaranteed by GES for this condition.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Always CL for this profile.

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude. Recommended for distance-based search.

provider.description: A healthcare provider — clinic, hospital, medical center, independent professional, or other health facility. Maps to FHIR R4 Schedule.

provider_id.description: Unique identifier within the vendor's system.

accepts_fonasa.description: Whether this provider accepts Fonasa coverage.

libre_eleccion.description: Whether provider is part of the Fonasa Libre Elección network.

superintendencia_code.description: Code in Registro Nacional de Prestadores — Superintendencia de Salud.

verified.description: Whether the consuming system has verified this provider's identity and credentials.

rating.description: Average rating (0–5). Managed by the consuming system, not the vendor.

slot.description: A single available appointment slot. Maps to FHIR R4 Slot.

slot_id.description: Unique identifier within the vendor's system. Must be stable — do not change between syncs.

provider_id.description: References the provider offering this slot.

professional_id.description: Optional internal identifier for the professional.

rut_professional.description: RUT of the individual professional delivering this appointment.

start_datetime.description: ISO 8601 with timezone offset. Use -03:00 (standard) or -04:00 (summer).

duration_minutes.description: Duration in minutes. Must be consistent with start/end datetimes.

accepts_fonasa.description: Whether this slot accepts Fonasa coverage.

insurance_accepted.description: Insurance and coverage types accepted for this specific slot.

libre_eleccion.description: Whether this slot is available under Fonasa Libre Elección.

base_price.description: Precio de la prestación para pacientes sin previsión (PARTICULAR), en CLP.

_schema.description: Schema identifier. Always openmaps-cl/0.1 for this version.

patient.description: Minimum patient information for a booking. OpenMAPS/CL deliberately limits patient data to protect privacy.

booking_request.description: A request to book a slot on behalf of a patient. Sent by the consuming system to the vendor. Maps to FHIR R4 Appointment (booking request).

insurance_type.description: The patient's insurance type for this appointment.

notes.example: Primera consulta. El paciente tiene derivación de médico general.

booking_response.description: The vendor's response to a booking request. Maps to FHIR R4 Appointment (booked/cancelled).

status.description: confirmed = booked. rejected = not available. pending = vendor will confirm asynchronously.

booking_id.description: Unique identifier in the vendor's system. Null when status is rejected.

confirmation_code.description: Human-readable code to show the patient.

message.example: Hora confirmada para el sábado 21 de marzo a las 10:00 en Centro Médico Providencia.

rejection_reason.description: Machine-readable reason code when status is rejected.

slot.description: The confirmed slot with updated status.

availability_payload.description: Top-level payload for publishing availability from a vendor to a consuming system.

vendor_id.description: Identifier of the software vendor publishing this data.

generated_at.description: When this payload was generated. ISO 8601 UTC.

providers.description: Provider details. Only required when provider information changes. Consuming systems should cache provider data.

sis_minsal_codes.description: Complete SIS-MINSAL specialty codes. Source: MINSAL Sistema de Información de Salud.
